response.global_analysis: Verified that the audio features a live performance of 'PHOENIX PRAYER'. The provided Reference JSON contained a partial section of the lyrics, so I have transcribed the full audio duration (4:43) of the song. I used the Reference JSON and on-screen text at 00:37 to confirm the title and spelling. Timestamps are precisely aligned to the vocal onset and offset, with logical splits for semantic continuity and character limits.

subtitles.original: PHOENIX PRAYER / 作詞・作曲：中村未来
subtitles.english: PHOENIX PRAYER / Lyrics & Composition: Miku Nakamura

subtitles.original: 劫々とつづくショートショート
subtitles.english: A short story that goes on and on

subtitles.original: 喪失は絶対零度だ
subtitles.english: Loss is absolute zero

subtitles.original: 今夜はリィンカーネーション
subtitles.english: Tonight is a reincarnation

subtitles.original: 哀しみが混沌の子守唄うたってるよ
subtitles.english: Sorrow is singing a lullaby of chaos

subtitles.original: 運命に理由があるのならば
subtitles.english: If there's a reason for fate...

subtitles.original: すべてを賭けてみたいの
subtitles.english: ...I want to risk it all

subtitles.original: あなたを守りたい
subtitles.english: I want to protect you

subtitles.original: どこまでも高く飛べるわ
subtitles.english: I can fly as high as I want

subtitles.original: どこまでも強く強くなれるわ
subtitles.english: I can become stronger and stronger as I want

subtitles.original: 信じて 私に出会えた奇跡
subtitles.english: Believe in the miracle of us meeting

subtitles.original: 切り開くわ 不死鳥の炎 抱いて
subtitles.english: I'll carve a path, embracing the phoenix's flame

subtitles.original: あなたの側 高く高く
subtitles.english: By your side, higher and higher...

subtitles.original: 眼差し 抱きたくなるの
subtitles.english: ...I start wanting to hold your gaze

subtitles.original: Flashback, flashback 振りほどけ
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback, shake it off

subtitles.original: 汗 挑み続けろ
subtitles.english: Sweat, keep on challenging

subtitles.original: 飄々と佇む ほとほと
subtitles.english: Standing aloof, quite weary...

subtitles.original: 私が必要でしょう
subtitles.english: ...you need me, don't you?

subtitles.original: 今夜はリィンカーネーション
subtitles.english: Tonight is a reincarnation

subtitles.original: 正しさがストレス最前線に 押し出すよ
subtitles.english: Correctness pushes us to the front lines of stress

subtitles.original: 運命に理由があるのならば
subtitles.english: If there's a reason for fate...

subtitles.original: 優しい世界をあげたい
subtitles.english: ...I want to give you a gentle world

subtitles.original: あなたを包むわ
subtitles.english: I'll embrace you

subtitles.original: どこまでも早く射抜くわ
subtitles.english: I'll pierce through as fast as I want

subtitles.original: どこまでも熱く熱く焦がすわ
subtitles.english: I'll burn hotter and hotter as I want

subtitles.original: 信じて 私に出会えた奇跡
subtitles.english: Believe in the miracle of us meeting

subtitles.original: 切り開くわ 不死鳥の炎 抱いて
subtitles.english: I'll carve a path, embracing the phoenix's flame

subtitles.original: あなたの側 高く高く
subtitles.english: By your side, higher and higher...

subtitles.original: 鏡越し 光を見せて
subtitles.english: ...show me the light through the mirror

subtitles.original: Flashback, flashback 許さない
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback, no forgiveness

subtitles.original: 偽証 進み続けろ
subtitles.english: Perjury, keep on moving forward

subtitles.original: 尽きるまで
subtitles.english: Until I'm exhausted

subtitles.original: 側に居ると
subtitles.english: When I'm by your side...

subtitles.original: 鼓動が早くて 目眩がする
subtitles.english: ...my heart beats faster and my head spins

subtitles.original: すべて捧げる もう決めたの
subtitles.english: I've already decided to give my everything

subtitles.original: 最後のチャンスだから もう離さない
subtitles.english: Because it's the last chance, I won't let go

subtitles.original: あなたに貰う 未来の風
subtitles.english: The wind of the future I receive from you...

subtitles.original: 重なっていけ
subtitles.english: ...let it overlap

subtitles.original: どこまでも高く飛べるわ
subtitles.english: I can fly as high as I want

subtitles.original: どこまでも強く強くなれるわ
subtitles.english: I can become stronger and stronger as I want

subtitles.original: 信じて 私に出会えた奇跡
subtitles.english: Believe in the miracle of us meeting

subtitles.original: 闇夜をも 望めば 輝夜にするから
subtitles.english: Because if you wish, I'll turn even the dark night into a moonlit one

subtitles.original: 切り開くわ 不死鳥の炎 抱いて
subtitles.english: I'll carve a path, embracing the phoenix's flame

subtitles.original: あなたの側 高く高く
subtitles.english: By your side, higher and higher...

subtitles.original: 眼差し 抱きたくなるの
subtitles.english: ...I start wanting to hold your gaze

subtitles.original: Flashback, flashback 振りほどけ
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback, shake it off

subtitles.original: 汗 挑み続けろ
subtitles.english: Sweat, keep on challenging

subtitles.original: あなたの側 高く高く
subtitles.english: By your side, higher and higher...

subtitles.original: 鏡越し 光を見せて
subtitles.english: ...show me the light through the mirror

subtitles.original: Flashback, flashback 許さない
subtitles.english: Flashback, flashback, no forgiveness

subtitles.original: 偽証 進み続けろ
subtitles.english: Perjury, keep on moving forward

subtitles.english: Until I'm exhausted
